sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1297" key="a)diamo/rfwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδια-μόρφωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1297.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not fully formed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.101</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάρξ</foreign> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:22:5:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.5.3</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νέμητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be divided</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.3</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n1297.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">undivided</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1733.tlg001:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
